rows.USen: <unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Y'know...you look an awful lot like Link...

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Y'know...<unk[5:1]>you look an awful lot like
Master Kohga's archenemy, Link!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>原来你只是和他发色一样啊！<unk[5:1]>
真是不吉利！！
作为依盖队，头发就应该是纯正的黑色啊！

<unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>我可不能让你这种
轻浮的人通过这里。
你这种家伙还是先去重新接受锻炼吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>不對，你只是髮色跟他一樣嘛！<unk[5:1]>
太觸霉頭了吧！！
依蓋隊成員的頭髮應該要是漆黑如夜的黑色啊！

<unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>我可不能放你這種
吊兒郎當的人通過，
你這種傢伙還是先回去矯正一下態度再來吧。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>みたいな<Ruby={2:4}かみ>髪の<Ruby={2:2}け>毛じゃねぇか！<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:6}えんぎ>縁起でもねぇ！！
イーガ<Ruby={2:4}だん>団つったら <Ruby={4:8}しっこく>漆黒のブラックだろうが！

<unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>そんなチャラチャラした<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴を
<Ruby={2:4}とお>通すわけにはいかねぇな
お<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前みたいなヤツは
<Ruby={4:8}いっかい>一回しごかれてこいや
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>Or at least your blasted blond hair does!
Listen, you do know why we wear
uniforms, right? To look UNIFORM!
When you think of the Yiga Clan emerging
from the shadows, you think of them as
a fearsome, largely identical unit!
I mean, yeah, OK, some of us are a bit
bulkier than others, but that Link-like hair
of yours sticks out like a sore thumb!
<unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>So, y'know what? I'm not gonna let you
in here! At least, not until you learn how
to fall in line!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>あの<Ruby={2:6}やぐら>櫓の<Ruby={2:4}うえ>上が <Ruby={6:14}たんれんじょう>鍛錬場だ<unk[5:1]>
あそこで その<Ruby={6:14}こんじょうたた>根性叩き<Ruby={2:4}なお>直してもらうんだな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Get yourself to our training ground on top
of that tower.

They'll teach you how to act right!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 76 97 117 103 104 66 97 100]>只要你接受一次锻炼，
我就放你通过这里～
当然……<unk[5:0]>
前提是你还能活着回来。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 76 97 117 103 104 66 97 100]>只要你去那裡受一次鍛鍊，
我就可以放你通過這裡～
當然……<unk[5:0]>
前提是你有辦法從那裡活著回來。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 76 97 117 103 104 66 97 100]><Ruby={4:8}いっかい>一回でも <Ruby={4:8}たんれん>鍛錬をうけたら
ここは <Ruby={2:4}とお>通してやってもいいぜ～
<Ruby={2:2}い>生きて<Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰ってこられたなら…<unk[5:0]>
だけどな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 76 97 117 103 104 66 97 100]>Make it through our training, and I guess
I'll let you in.

If you come back alive, that is!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 65 110 103 114 121]>お<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前みたいな チャラついた<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴は
<Ruby={2:4}とお>通してやんね～よ
どうしてもってんなら
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 65 110 103 114 121]>Listen, fancy-pants! Those golden locks of
yours stand out. We Yiga are supposed to
sneak around. See the problem?
But if you really want to get in here
that badly...

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>結果你只是髮色跟他一樣嘛！<unk[5:1]>
太觸霉頭了吧！！
依蓋隊成員的頭髮應該要是漆黑如夜的黑色啊！

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>……算了，現在人手不足，<unk[5:1]>
所以只要是還能動的人就行了。
趕快過去吧。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>みたいな<Ruby={2:4}かみ>髪の<Ruby={2:2}け>毛じゃねぇか！<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:6}えんぎ>縁起でもねぇ！！
イーガ<Ruby={2:4}だん>団つったら <Ruby={4:8}しっこく>漆黒のブラックだろうが！

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>…まあ とりあえず<Ruby={2:4}うご>動ける<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴ならなんでもいい<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今は<Ruby={4:6}ひとで>人手が<Ruby={2:2}た>足りてないんでな
さっさと<Ruby={2:2}い>行きな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>Or at least your hair does! Our clan's
whole thing is being mysterious and
monolithic, and buddy, you stand out.
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>Well, as long as you can earn your keep,
I suppose I can ignore the Link look.<unk[5:1]>
We are really short on hands.
Anyway, hurry on in.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:24 83 104 105 116 97 117 99 104 105 95 48 48]>I can't believe you made it through our
training in one piece...

<unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>OK, fine, you've proved your worth.<unk[5:1]> I still
don't approve of the hair, but we're short
on hands, so I can overlook it.
Hurry on in.
